binding_decisions.scope_upper_bound: hard-capped at flow.md L95; L96+ excluded by spec Out-of-Scope

downstream_artifacts_required.m_testplan: Authored by Archer; reviewed by S-tier Prism (sole technical reviewer); Shield may provide executability feedback but not approve; Sage MUST NOT approve M-TESTPLAN.
downstream_artifacts_required.m_arch: Authored by Archer; reviewed by Prism; defines workflow driver, write ownership lease, review verdict semantics, semantic task/session persistence, OpenCode result validation adapter, reconcile identity contracts.
downstream_artifacts_required.m_dev: Driven by Devon; covered by FR-1900 / FR-2000 / FR-2100 / NFR-0100 / NFR-0200 / NFR-0300; the four out-of-scope items (return-upstream/bounded waiver/no-new-debt adoption/CLI absence) belong to v0.14 spec 2/3/4.

side_effects_after_approval.issues_created_reason: M-LOCK-1 approval is bound to this digest; FR-1800 Issue creation belongs to the next workflow run after M-LOCK-1 is human-approved in Web. This JSON records the approval; it does NOT trigger Issue creation.
side_effects_after_approval.git_commits: pending implementation by Devon in v0.14 spec 2/3/4

stale_triggers: Any byte change in story.md, spec.md, or acceptance.md invalidates this decision.
Any change in bound_story_digest, spec_digest, acceptance_digest, or doc_index_digest_sha256 invalidates this decision.
Adoption of FR-0910 / FR-0110 / FR-0720 contracts into this Spec is forbidden and would invalidate the scope statement.
notes: This decision is recorded by Maestro into the spec directory as a non-authoritative human-approval artifact; it does not commit, push, call Runtime, or create Issues.
Downstream Spec 2/3/4 MUST not reinterpret the 24 active units; they only add M-TESTPLAN / M-ARCH / M-DEV support.
